me.text: Hi! My name is Luiz Felipe Warmling Amadeu, and I was born on December 18, 2005, in Paraná, Brazil. I am passionate about technology and have been programming since I was 8 years old. I am dedicated to creating efficient and scalable web solutions as a full-stack developer.

milestones.title: Integrated Technical Course in Information Technology

list.name: API Restful Course with Node.js, TypeScript, and TypeORM
JavaScript and TypeScript from Basic to Advanced
Second Place - Mathematics Olympiad of Paranavaí

jobs.name: Freelancer
tasks: Developing frontend and backend solutions for various clients
Building complex web applications and robust API integrations
Delivering scalable and efficient products ensuring client satisfaction

jobs.name: Aupi
tasks: Developed the frontend interface for a Django-based system
Created Aupi Tools, a frontend platform consuming external APIs for web utilities
Implemented backend functionalities and optimized existing solutions
Enhanced user experience and resolved integration and performance issues

jobs.name: Freelancer
tasks: Developed solutions for frontend, fullstack, and e-commerce applications
Used Next.js on the frontend and Django on the backend
Created interactive interfaces and integrated external APIs
